step.description: Check for required inputs before processing.
step.purpose: Ensures all necessary data is available for processing.
Verifies that data has not been corrupted.
Creates a record for debugging and tracking issues.

step.description: Review and test outputs against specified criteria.
step.purpose: Ensures the quality and correctness of outputs.

step.description: Gather feedback from users and stakeholders.
step.purpose: Improves future iterations and quality of prompts.
